Author: BlueWaveXIV
Name: AutoList
Description: AutoList turns retainer Market Board chores into supervised AutoList and AutoRefresh workflows with a small in-game tray that lights up when your character is ready to start.
Punchline: Turn retainer listing from market-board chore into one-click momentum.
Changelog:
Fixed the AutoList icon in the Dalamud plugin list.
Added release notes metadata so Dalamud can show changelog text for updates.
No AutoList or AutoRefresh workflow behaviour changed in this build.
